scenario.name: IMS Register Batch - Single Round
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch];rport From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=UDP> Authorization: Digest username="[field0]@[field1]",realm="[field1]",uri="sip:[field1]",nonce="",response="" User-Agent: SIPp IMS Client Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch];rport From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=UDP> Authorization: Digest username="[field0]@[field1]",realm="[field1]",uri="sip:[field1]",nonce="",response="" User-Agent: SIPp IMS Client Expires: 0 Content-Length: 0
